task_completion.description: Create individual expense records for Sarah Chen for all items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo 'Expenses' screen showing individual expense lines created for Sarah Chen. Look for categories like Hotel, Conference, Airfare, Meals, and Transportation with amounts matching the privileged info.

task_completion.description: Group the individual expenses into a single expense report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An Expense Report screen in Odoo containing the 5 expense items for Sarah Chen, with a total amount of approximately $1420.65.

task_completion.description: Submit the expense report to the manager.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Expense Report in Odoo shows a status of 'Submitted' or 'To Approve', typically indicated by a status bar or badge at the top right of the record.
The Expense Report in Odoo shows a status of 'Approved', and the 'Approve' button has been clicked or is no longer the primary action.

task_completion.description: Post the approved expense report to the accounting books.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Expense Report in Odoo shows a status of 'Posted' or 'Done', or there is a visible 'Journal Entry' linked to the report indicating it has been posted to the accounting books.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface to process the expenses.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Odoo application, rather than terminal commands executing database scripts or API requests.

integrity.description: The agent followed the natural Odoo workflow rather than faking the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: A logical sequence of screenshots showing the creation of expenses, grouping them into a report, and sequentially clicking through Submit, Approve, and Post actions.

integrity.description: The agent opened and read the source expense claim file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Early screenshots should show 'expense_claim_sarah_chen.txt' opened in a text editor or terminal to extract the required details.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Employee: Sarah Chen. Total: $1420.65. Items: Hotel ($487.50), Conference ($375.00), Airfare ($312.00), Meals ($156.75), Transportation ($89.40). Amounts have a 2% tolerance.
